_notes: Embarrassingly plain by design (plan §4A): one unconflicted, recent, relevant fact. The two extra records are neutral filler — not semantic distractors — present only so the store is larger than top-k and withholding rows exist. If L1 cannot beat L0 here, stop loudly. Doubles as the L-A cell: governance spends steps and sidecar reads here for zero accuracy gain, so naive should win on cost at oracle parity.
